understanding.goal_understanding: The goal was to navigate the player character to the goal gem tile marked '+' by moving horizontally and using gravity to fall through passages, while avoiding spike tiles. Each level required reaching the gem within 50 turns, with 2 attempts per level.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: MOVE_LEFT and MOVE_RIGHT shift the player one tile horizontally, then gravity pulls them in the current gravity direction until landing on a solid tile or hazard. CLICK removes breakable 'x' tiles to open new fall paths without consuming movement turns. Landing on spikes ('u'/'v') ends the run. The structured state provides left_landing and right_landing predictions showing where the player will end up after gravity resolves. Corridor scan shows all reachable columns and marks passages where the player would drop to a different y-level. UNDO reverts the last action for recovery. In this level, gravity was DOWN (toward higher y values), so clicking blocks below the player opened passages to fall through. The player needed to click strategic breakable blocks to create paths through the level before moving.
